widgets_values:
The "You are an assistant... <Prompt Start> " text before the actual prompt is the one used in the official example.

The reason it is exposed to the user like this is because the model still works if you modify or remove it.
----------------------------------------------
I'm not sure if it really works and is useful. I tried different prefixes, the results are controversial. Bypassed by default.

nodes.title: Prefix
widgets_values:
You are an assistant designed to generate images based on textual prompts. Make the girl topless and showing her tongue.
The girl is rubbing her pussy.
Bypass (when the group is active) or even delete the preprocessor preview node if you don't need it.

The "Florence-2 caption group" and "play sound node" are optional. You can delete them freely if you do not need them. To execute captioning, activate the group and press the play button on it or on "preview" node (the green one).

nodes.title: Inpaint note
widgets_values:
Inpaint works pretty unstable, same as the Qwen-image model (actually much worse). Sometimes it's necessary to set denoise to 0.8 to make even slight changes.
Inpaint will use the original resolution of an image and will ignore any settings in the Resolution Master node.
For some reason, combining resize and inpaint makes encoding take a long time.
Also, using Inpaint and ControlNet at the same time is not a good idea, but you could try it anyway.
